jokes.text: Oh, my God. Gary. Oh, my God, oh, my God, oh, my God, oh, my God!
jokes.setup: Selina and Gary are caught somewhere they shouldn't be
jokes.punchline: Gary's panicked repetition escalates the absurdity
jokes.explanation: Classic physical comedy setup with Gary's characteristic panic response

jokes.text: If this were my library, I would make sure the people could sit behind the desk. Can you even have a library? Seems like it'd be more like a bookmobile.
jokes.setup: Selina critiques another president's library arrangement
jokes.punchline: The devastating escalation to 'bookmobile' - implying the presidency was so brief it merits a mobile library
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation from mild criticism to devastating putdown. Perfect Selina delivery - cruel but clever

jokes.text: If only the American people could've known you for your sense of humor instead of your bizarre indifference to apartheid.
jokes.setup: Fake compliment about President Stevenson's humor
jokes.punchline: Devastating historical criticism delivered as casual observation
jokes.explanation: Masterful Selina insult - starts sweet then delivers brutal historical slam with perfect casual delivery

jokes.text: How they 'Jewed him down,' as Mother used to say when she wasn't busy telling me he only picked me as a running mate so that he could look taller.
jokes.setup: Selina quotes her dead mother's problematic language
jokes.punchline: The escalating revelation about why she was chosen as VP
jokes.explanation: Dark family history reveals both casual bigotry and Selina's insecurities about her political value

jokes.text: Supermodels are your height. It doesn't matter. She's dead. Who cares?
jokes.setup: Gary tries to console Selina about her height
jokes.punchline: Selina's brutal dismissal of her dead mother
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina - compartmentalizes maternal trauma with casual cruelty

jokes.text: Unlike small-town America, Andrew fucks me in a way I really enjoy.
jokes.setup: Discussion of how Andrew moving back in will look to small-town America
jokes.punchline: Selina's brutally direct comparison prioritizing sexual satisfaction over optics
jokes.explanation: Shocking sexual frankness delivered with political comparison structure - peak Selina inappropriateness

jokes.text: No Mrs. Hughes. She must be hanging from the rafters somewhere.
jokes.setup: Looking for Mrs. Hughes for photos
jokes.punchline: Casual suggestion that the First Lady might have hanged herself
jokes.explanation: Darkly casual suicide reference delivered as if discussing normal whereabouts

jokes.text: This is as impromptu as a colonoscopy except with quadruple the assholes.
jokes.setup: Commenting on the 'impromptu' photo op with former presidents
jokes.punchline: Medical metaphor with literal/figurative asshole wordplay
jokes.explanation: Clever double meaning - medical procedure analogy with literal asshole count. Quotable structure.

jokes.text: Are we running from something scary, ma'am? No. Richard, you slow down. It'll look like I'm not running. Gary, you go fast. Yep! Oh, no, that's too fast.
jokes.setup: Richard asks why they're running
jokes.punchline: Selina's contradictory speed instructions to control optics
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy of trying to manage appearances while literally running away

jokes.text: I want a goddamn 'look at the size of my dick,' 'bring history to life' presidential library.
jokes.setup: Selina wants a presidential library
jokes.punchline: Reducing prestigious institution to crude power metaphor
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina - reduces noble presidential tradition to crude ego measurement

jokes.text: Because you served less than one year? No. Because nobody gives me any respect.
jokes.setup: Richard offers obvious reason why she doesn't have a library
jokes.punchline: Selina rejects factual explanation for delusional one
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina delusion - rejecting obvious truth for self-serving narrative

jokes.text: Never forget. Oh, sorry, that's the Holocaust. Totally forgot.
jokes.setup: Selina says 'Never forget' about her presidency
jokes.punchline: Realizes she's quoting Holocaust remembrance, then ironically says she 'forgot'
jokes.explanation: Dark irony - forgets Holocaust reference while discussing remembrance, perfect verbal irony

jokes.text: I need a monument to Selina Meyer. An institution. Selina Meyer belongs in an institution.
jokes.setup: Selina wants an institution dedicated to her
jokes.punchline: Gary's accidental suggestion she belongs in a mental institution
jokes.explanation: Perfect accidental wordplay - Gary unknowingly suggests psychiatric commitment

jokes.text: I wanna talk to every Tom, Dick, and Gehry out there.
jokes.setup: Standard expression 'every Tom, Dick, and Harry'
jokes.punchline: Replaces 'Harry' with 'Gehry' (famous architect Frank Gehry)
jokes.explanation: Clever architectural wordplay, though somewhat predictable given context

jokes.text: Maybe a female candidate. Well, we're not redoing a kitchen, here, you know?
jokes.setup: Mike suggests a female architect
jokes.punchline: Selina's casually sexist dismissal
jokes.explanation: Reveals Selina's internalized sexism despite being a woman president

jokes.text: 'cause, you know, he was also a part-termer.
jokes.setup: Comparing her library to Kennedy's
jokes.punchline: Casually comparing her brief presidency to JFK's assassination-shortened term
jokes.explanation: Darkly casual comparison between her failed presidency and JFK's assassination

jokes.text: That sweaty pederast has ruined more kids than the Common Core.
jokes.setup: Warning about someone dangerous to children
jokes.punchline: Comparing child predator to educational policy in terms of 'ruining kids'
jokes.explanation: Dark political humor comparing criminal behavior to educational policy

jokes.text: Luckily, Will's anal halitosis renders him completely unbouffable.
jokes.setup: Discussing Will's protection from predators
jokes.punchline: Graphic medical condition described as protective mechanism
jokes.explanation: Gross-out humor with invented medical condition and French slang

jokes.text: I'm fortunate to be odious to all colors of the sexual spectrum.
jokes.setup: Will explains his protection from sexual predators
jokes.punchline: Clinical description of his universal sexual repulsiveness
jokes.explanation: Will's characteristic clinical self-deprecation with rainbow metaphor

jokes.text: So, what is it? Speak, Professor X-Gayvier.
jokes.setup: Demanding Will explain himself
jokes.punchline: X-Men reference combined with homophobic slur
jokes.explanation: Pop culture portmanteau with slur - shows Furlong's crude humor

jokes.text: let me save you the peanut log you're about to squeeze out of your face anus here... no.
jokes.setup: Furlong anticipates Will's request
jokes.punchline: Describing Will's mouth as 'face anus' producing 'peanut logs'
jokes.explanation: Gross scatological metaphor for speech, characteristic Furlong cruelty

jokes.text: You remain in detention on the Ethics Committee with the rest of the special ed Breakfast Club.
jokes.setup: Assigning Will to Ethics Committee
jokes.punchline: Combining detention metaphor with 80s movie reference and disability slur
jokes.explanation: Movie reference twisted with offensive comparison, typical Furlong insult

jokes.text: Good luck getting your precious back from those mean hobbits, Sméagol.
jokes.setup: Dismissing Jonah
jokes.punchline: Lord of the Rings reference casting Jonah as the corrupted Sméagol
jokes.explanation: Fantasy reference playing on Jonah's appearance and desperate political ambition

jokes.text: That's a false equivalence, but I appreciate the sentiment.
jokes.setup: Will apologizes by saying 'a job's a job'
jokes.punchline: Kent's overly analytical response to simple sympathy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent - applies logical analysis to emotional gesture

jokes.text: Maybe use it for up here and focus on this. Oh, yeah, let's give the people what they want.
jokes.setup: Portrait painter focusing on her lower body
jokes.punchline: Selina directing attention to her breasts with political slogan
jokes.explanation: Sexual vanity disguised as populist rhetoric during portrait session

jokes.text: Well, I guess AIDS had a good run.
jokes.setup: Learning people are more interested in her library than AIDS charity
jokes.punchline: Casual dismissal of AIDS as if it were a cancelled TV show
jokes.explanation: Shockingly casual dismissal of global health crisis with entertainment metaphor

jokes.text: As long as he promises not to blow up my library, I mean, I don't really give a shit.
jokes.setup: Pakistani donor wanting cousin off no-fly list
jokes.punchline: Casual acceptance of potential terrorism as long as her library is safe
jokes.explanation: Dark political humor about terrorism concerns vs. personal ambition

jokes.text: I really wanna have a reflecting pool someplace for people to come and sit and reflect on what this cocksuck of a country did to me.
jokes.setup: Describing peaceful reflecting pool concept
jokes.punchline: Revealing it's for people to contemplate her victimhood, not her legacy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina narcissism - memorial architecture serving her grievances, not inspiration

jokes.text: I'm gonna scratch it into the paper and then kind of go back over and trace over and see what I wrote before, like in a suspense movie.
jokes.setup: Richard's pen is out of ink
jokes.punchline: Elaborate plan to solve simple problem using movie tropes
jokes.explanation: Richard's characteristic over-complication of simple tasks with pop culture logic

jokes.text: They said the Sherman Tanz pardon was unsavory and not in line with the values of Yale. Then they asked for a donation to their annual fund.
jokes.setup: Yale rejects library due to moral objections
jokes.punchline: Immediately asking for money despite moral stance
jokes.explanation: Perfect institutional hypocrisy - moral rejection followed by immediate fundraising

jokes.text: Just like a Smith girl, open to exploring.
jokes.setup: Smith College is 'open to exploring' the library
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo about women's college students
jokes.explanation: Predictable lesbian joke about women's college, relies on stereotype

jokes.text: I'm not really comfortable with that kind of language.
jokes.setup: Everyone cursing Yale University
jokes.punchline: Richard's prudish objection to mild profanity
jokes.explanation: Richard's characteristic prudishness contrasted with the room's mood

jokes.text: Oh, shit! Oh, my God. No, no, we're not hiding anymore. Oh, she's too much! How the fuck long was that kid here for?
jokes.setup: Mike realizes his daughter Ellen has been hiding in the office
jokes.punchline: Selina's horror at discovering child presence during inappropriate conversations
jokes.explanation: Child's innocent presence contrasted with adult workplace dysfunction

jokes.text: I'm sure that there are some bored housewives out there that would enjoy ogling your Walter Cronkite, but to me, it looks like local morning news from, I don't know, Delaware.
jokes.setup: Critiquing Dan's news piece
jokes.punchline: Combining sexual metaphor with devastating geographic putdown
jokes.explanation: Sexual journalism metaphor combined with geographic insult targeting mediocrity

jokes.text: Wives in this town make the social calendar. Mrs. Furlong likes inviting couples, not unregistered sex offenders.
jokes.setup: Explaining Washington social dynamics to Jonah
jokes.punchline: Casually categorizing Jonah as sex offender in social planning context
jokes.explanation: Kent's analytical approach to brutal social categorization of Jonah

jokes.text: I am a balling bachelor sexual congressman, and I will be passing bills by day and smashing gash by night.
jokes.setup: Jonah rejecting advice about needing a wife
jokes.punchline: Crude political/sexual parallel with terrible slang
jokes.explanation: Jonah's characteristic crude bravado, revealing his fundamental misunderstanding of everything

jokes.text: Congressman, being a bachelor in this town means you're gayer than a TV evangelist.
jokes.setup: Warning about bachelor perception in DC
jokes.punchline: Comparison to closeted religious figures
jokes.explanation: Sharp political observation about appearances and hypocrisy in religious figures

jokes.text: statistically speaking, married politicians have more sex with more single women than single politicians.
jokes.setup: Kent providing relationship advice
jokes.punchline: Clinical statistical analysis of political infidelity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent - reducing political scandal to statistical analysis

jokes.text: Oh, what did you envision, Woody, that you and Buzz Lightyear would win this election and Andy would play with you again?
jokes.setup: Mocking campaign manager's expectations
jokes.punchline: Toy Story metaphor casting them as abandoned toys
jokes.explanation: Clever pop culture metaphor for political abandonment and nostalgia

jokes.text: He's just gotta go to a Laundromat, meet a girl, take her to a movie, a little chit-chat, couple-three drinks, standard hayjay in the cab home, and a year later, he's a father.
jokes.setup: Critiquing Kent's elaborate dating plan
jokes.punchline: Reducing courtship to crude mechanical process
jokes.explanation: Furlong's crude reductionism of romance to transactional steps

jokes.text: We had to extend to the greater Baltimore, Arlington, Alexandria area to find them. Well, we got a 'maybe' in Delaware. She's waiting to see your hair grow back.
jokes.setup: Explaining the limited pool of potential dates for Jonah
jokes.punchline: Even expanding geographically, one woman wants to wait for his hair
jokes.explanation: Geographic escalation reveals Jonah's complete romantic failure across multiple states

jokes.text: Flux. That's what I said. Did you wanna hang that? Yeah. Great. Wow! I just... I can't believe it. Look at us.
jokes.setup: Gary correcting Selina's 'fucked' to 'flux'
jokes.punchline: Awkward silence as they avoid addressing what just happened
jokes.explanation: Awkward cover-up of Selina's inappropriate language in academic setting

jokes.text: You know what, I'm strictly a scotch girl and I always have been, so I never really experimented... with Chardonnay.
jokes.setup: Gigi reminiscing about college drinking
jokes.punchline: Selina avoiding lesbian subtext with awkward alcohol preference explanation
jokes.explanation: Awkward deflection of romantic history with overly specific alcohol preferences

jokes.text: Sherman Tanz is particularly sensitive to prison conditions. And he is intimately involved with every aspect of his company. Now, that being said, he had no idea what was going on.
jokes.setup: Describing Tanz as intimately involved in his company
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicting herself by saying he had no idea about problems
jokes.explanation: Perfect political contradiction - intimate involvement and complete ignorance simultaneously

jokes.text: phallus quo
jokes.setup: Trying to say 'status quo'
jokes.punchline: Says 'phallus quo' instead
jokes.explanation: Perfect malapropism that actually improves the meaning while being hilariously wrong

jokes.text: Wait a minute, what? One of you is pregnant? Congratulations. So, which one of you is the carrier?
jokes.setup: Catherine and Marjorie announce pregnancy plans
jokes.punchline: Selina treating lesbian pregnancy like a shipping logistics question
jokes.explanation: Selina's clinical approach to family reproduction reduces intimacy to logistics

jokes.text: Oh, my God. Can you imagine having a baby in Georgia?
jokes.setup: Mike telling story about mentally ill sperm donor
jokes.punchline: Selina focuses on geographic horror instead of genetic concerns
jokes.explanation: Perfect misdirection - ignores serious genetic concerns to focus on regional snobbery

jokes.text: Why don't you use Gary's sperm? It's just sitting there gathering dust.
jokes.setup: Need for trustworthy sperm donor
jokes.punchline: Treating Gary's reproductive material like unused office supplies
jokes.explanation: Casually commodifies Gary's sexuality with household maintenance metaphor

jokes.text: Hey, do you know how they remove a cancerous testicle? No. A lot of people think that they just slice one off, right? What they really do is they make an incision just a little bit further up, and they go in and they grab the testicle, and they pull it out of the scrotum and out through the body.
jokes.setup: Jonah on a date trying to make conversation
jokes.punchline: Graphic medical explanation as romantic dinner talk
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah - completely inappropriate medical oversharing on first date

jokes.text: 1.5 if we can get his dyslexic daughter into Smith. Well, maybe get her to write the check. Get 5.1 out of him.
jokes.setup: Donor offering money for daughter's admission
jokes.punchline: Exploiting learning disability for financial gain
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy exploiting disability for number confusion - characteristic Amy cynicism

jokes.text: People are gonna think you're the hot, young babysitter. No, they won't. Like we played last night. Oh, my God. Stop it, Mr. Meyer.
jokes.setup: Andrew consoling Selina about feeling old
jokes.punchline: Revealing their sexual roleplay scenarios
jokes.explanation: Awkward sexual oversharing in family context with inappropriate roleplay

jokes.text: Message number one... 'I can still taste you in my mouth from last night.' Boy, we should not be listening to that. That's probably to her boyfriend. I imagine she's texting while riding her bicycle and sent it to me by mistake.
jokes.setup: Car reading Helen's explicit text messages
jokes.punchline: Selina's increasingly desperate attempts to rationalize the messages
jokes.explanation: Escalating denial as explicit evidence accumulates - bicycle excuse particularly absurd

jokes.text: Second message... 'You came so much. Andrew, we ruined your wife's pretty office chair. I get so hot thinking of the president sitting in our love puddle. Call me after the fundraiser.'
jokes.setup: Even more explicit message being read
jokes.punchline: Graphic details about desecrating presidential furniture
jokes.explanation: Escalates sexual violation to include presidential symbolism and furniture desecration

jokes.text: That was a long one. She must be at a light.
jokes.setup: Extremely explicit and long text message
jokes.punchline: Continuing bicycle texting theory despite impossible message length
jokes.explanation: Perfect denial escalation - maintaining absurd bicycle theory despite overwhelming evidence

jokes.text: You are the devil! You are the fucking devil! Gary! Stop! Gary! I swear to God! I will kill you in your face! Stop it!
jokes.setup: Selina discovering Andrew's affair
jokes.punchline: Violent rage directed at innocent Gary with nonsensical threat
jokes.explanation: Misplaced rage with anatomically impossible death threat - classic Selina displacement

jokes.text: So, luckily, the doctors were able to remove the mass without a full mastectomy, so I got to keep my nipple. Whoo-hoo, right?
jokes.setup: Inappropriate dinner party conversation
jokes.punchline: Celebrating retained nipple with party enthusiasm
jokes.explanation: Medical oversharing at social event with inappropriate celebratory tone

jokes.text: Andrew is very hard to get rid of. He's like the herpes virus or an unwanted child. In this case, he gave me both.
jokes.setup: Comparing Andrew to persistent problems
jokes.punchline: Revealing he literally provided both examples
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation - metaphorical comparisons become literal in devastating punchline

jokes.text: Right? You just rolled your eyes like the world's bitchiest mime.
jokes.setup: Calling out Gary's eye-rolling
jokes.punchline: Combining attitude critique with performance art metaphor
jokes.explanation: Creative insult combining Gary's silent judgment with mime performance

jokes.text: And only case of schizophrenia, but my uncle-grandpa had her sterilized, and we are all good...
jokes.setup: Gary trying to minimize family problems
jokes.punchline: Revealing horrific family dynamics with casual terminology
jokes.explanation: Dark family history revealed with Gary's characteristic casual oversharing

jokes.text: Listen, honey, I want you to tell your whore of a father that I fired the art skank.
jokes.setup: Selina talking to Catherine about Andrew
jokes.punchline: Using daughter as messenger for crude parental insults
jokes.explanation: Inappropriate parental communication using child as messenger for adult conflict

jokes.text: Ma'am, you are unstable and manipulative, and I worry about the genes you'll pass down to your child... but your ex is worse.
jokes.setup: Gary's brutal honesty about Selina's parenting fitness
jokes.punchline: Softening criticism by comparing to Andrew
jokes.explanation: Gary's rare moment of brutal honesty delivered with characteristic diplomatic ending

jokes.text: Apparently, Andrew kept referring to his penis as the 'First Chubby.'
jokes.setup: Helen's revelations about Andrew
jokes.punchline: Presidential title applied to male anatomy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant presidential protocol applied to sexual anatomy - perfectly quotable

jokes.text: Okay, well, fucked again by the First Chubby.
jokes.setup: Learning they can't sue Helen
jokes.punchline: Using Andrew's penis nickname as metaphor for being screwed over
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback using sexual nickname as metaphor for political/legal screwing

jokes.text: I'm the only one who didn't do anything wrong in this 'trifuckta.'
jokes.setup: Selina defending her innocence in scandal
jokes.punchline: Creating portmanteau of 'trifecta' and profanity
jokes.explanation: Clever neologism combining statistical concept with crude situation assessment

jokes.text: Oh, that is your color.
jokes.setup: Selina mentions wearing scarlet letter
jokes.punchline: Gary's supportive fashion comment about shame symbolism
jokes.explanation: Gary's characteristic supportive obliviousness treating shame symbol as fashion choice

jokes.text: What am I supposed to do, rehire Frida Swallow?
jokes.setup: Asked to rehire Helen Wright
jokes.punchline: Renaming her with crude sexual reference
jokes.explanation: Sexual pun name construction revealing Selina's crude view of Helen

jokes.text: That's like Princess Di hiring Camilla Parker Bowles to be her limo driver. I mean, I'm just... you know, although in that case, it would've worked out better for her, obviously, but...
jokes.setup: Comparing hiring Helen to Diana hiring Camilla
jokes.punchline: Dark observation about Diana's death and driving
jokes.explanation: Dark royal comparison with inadvertent death joke - typical Selina insensitivity

jokes.text: I can't believe I spent the night in jail. It's a piddly DUI. In Nevada, that's practically a resume builder. There's a guy driving drunk on the state flag right next to the guy beating his wife.
jokes.setup: Buddy complaining about DUI arrest
jokes.punchline: Fictional state flag with domestic violence imagery
jokes.explanation: Regional stereotype joke about Nevada's permissive culture with flag imagery

jokes.text: You wanna see my big, blue balls? This is them!
jokes.setup: Drunk confrontation with police
jokes.punchline: Exposing himself to prove masculinity
jokes.explanation: Crude drunk behavior more shocking than funny

jokes.text: This predator has roofied more women than Kappa Alpha Cosby.
jokes.setup: Dan warning woman about Jonah
jokes.punchline: Fictional fraternity named after Bill Cosby
jokes.explanation: Dark fraternity joke combining Greek life with celebrity scandal

jokes.text: Well, you can pack up your crayons and get the fuck out of here.
jokes.setup: Firing the portrait painter
jokes.punchline: Reducing professional art supplies to children's materials
jokes.explanation: Selina's dismissive infantilization of artist's professional tools

jokes.text: If there's one thing I learned in the Air National Guard, it is respect for a woman in uniform. I have no hate in my heart. I love women, especially my beautiful fiancée, Amy.
jokes.setup: Buddy giving post-arrest interview
jokes.punchline: Claiming military respect for women after harassing female officer
jokes.explanation: Hypocritical damage control claiming military values after documented misconduct
